zh.of Crimmitschau, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪
zh.Schonburg, Sachsen, Prussia: 德國薩辛瑙包格書額波格
zh.Crimmitschau, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg於大約1220年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪時，他的父親Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg31歲，母親Christina von Meißen32歲。他於大約1248年與Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg在德國薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年7月2日在德國享年70歲。

zh-hans.Crimmitschau, Sachsen, Germany: 德国薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg于大约1220年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪时，他的父亲Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg31岁，母亲Christina von Meißen32岁。他于大约1248年与Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg在德国薩辛可萊斯 次維其考可利米恰豪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年7月2日在德国享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg was born about 1220, in Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Saxony, Germany, his father, Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg, was 31 and his mother, Christina von Meißen, was 32. He married Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg about 1248, in Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 2 July 1289, in Germany, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg est né environ 1220, à Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Christina von Meißen, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg environ 1248, à Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1289, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg um 1220 in Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg 31 und seine Mutter Christina von Meißen 32. Er hat um 1248 in Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Deutschland Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1289 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg è nato il circa 1220 nel Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Christina von Meißen, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg circa 1248, nel Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 2 luglio 1289, nel Germania, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Crimmitschau, Sachsen, Germany: ドイツサチセンクレイス ズウィクアウクリンミトスチャウ
ja.lifeSummary: Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburgが約1220年にドイツサチセンクレイス ズウィクアウクリンミトスチャウで生まれた時，父Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburgは31歳，母Christina von Meißenは32歳であった。約1248年にドイツサチセンクレイス ズウィクアウクリンミトスチャウでHedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年7月2日にドイツで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg(이)가 대략 1220년 독일 작센 크레이스 즈윅오 크림미츠차우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina von Meißen(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1248년 독일 작센 크레이스 즈윅오 크림미츠차우에서 Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 7월 2일 독일에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Christina von Meißen, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg aproximadamente 1248, em Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1289, em Alemanha, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg родился около 1220 г. в местности криммицчао, крис звиккау, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Christina von Meißen, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg около 1248 г. в местности криммицчао, крис звиккау, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 2 июля 1289 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto VI von Arnshaugk Lobdeburg nació aproximadamente 1220, en Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Hartmann III. Von Lobdenburg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Christina von Meißen, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hedwig von Schwarzburg-Blankenburg V; Count of Schwarzburg-Blanenburg aproximadamente 1248, en Crimmitschau, Kreis  Zwickau, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 2 de julio de 1289, en Alemania, a la edad de 70 años.
